sources.title: BMW Germany 4 Series Coupe technical data page
sources.note: Official BMW Germany technical-data page used for the supported G22 EU variant naming and drivetrain slice.

sources.title: BMW Ireland 4 Series Coupe technical data page
sources.note: Official BMW Ireland page used as a second EU-market cross-check for the supported G22 variant context.

sources.title: BMW UK 3 Series model listing
sources.note: Official BMW UK listing used for the G20 variant and drivetrain context around the supported 330i xDrive row.

sources.title: BMW Germany 3 Series overview page
sources.note: Official BMW Germany overview used as a market cross-check for the supported G20 variant context.

sources.title: BMW Germany F39 X2 2022 price list
sources.note: Official BMW Germany 11/2022 price list used to confirm the late-run EU F39 lineup, the 17/18/19-inch wheel matrix, and the continued absence of any EU-market sDrive28i or xDrive28i rows.

sources.title: BMW Cyprus F39 X2 2021 brochure
sources.note: Official BMW Cyprus brochure used to confirm the EU-family sDrive16d row exists as a front-wheel-drive state with manual-standard wording, bracketed automatic performance figures, and a 225/55 R17 base-tyre package, while not naming an exact automatic gearbox family.

sources.title: BMW Greece F39 X2 2022 brochure
sources.note: Official BMW Greece brochure used as a late-run EU-family cross-check for the F39 lineup, confirming the continued absence of EU 28i rows and the xDrive25e hybrid-specific 6-speed context.

sources.title: BMW Germany 3 Series Sedan 2024 price list
sources.note: Official BMW Germany 07/2024 price list used as a later-market cross-check for exact G20 318i and 320d rear-wheel-drive automatic continuity, including standard 225/50 R17 tire listings in the checked Germany-market slice.

sources.title: BMW Thailand 3 Series Gran Limousine G28 overview page
sources.note: Official BMW Thailand overview page explicitly tied to the 3 Series Gran Limousine G28 family, used to prove that the 320Li lineage belongs to the long-wheelbase G28 scope rather than the EU-market G20 shard.

sources.title: BMW India 3 Series Gran Limousine technical data page
sources.note: Official BMW India long-wheelbase technical-data page used to confirm G28 Gran Limousine scope and the market-facing 8-speed Steptronic Sport transmission wording across the non-EU long-wheelbase family.

sources.title: BMW China 3 Series Sedan 2024 specsheet
sources.note: Official BMW China specsheet whose embedded model data distinguishes G28 long-wheelbase from G20 standard-wheelbase and lists current 325Li and 330Li variants under the G28 family.

sources.title: BMW Italy 5 Series G30/G31 2023 price list
sources.note: Official BMW Italy 2023 price list used to confirm the exact G30 518d Sedan remains an automatic 110 kW / 150 PS state in the late run and to document the trim-dependent square and staggered wheel/tire matrix rather than one universal variant-wide default.

sources.title: BMW Germany 2 Series Coupe technical data page
sources.note: Official BMW Germany technical-data page used for current G42 lineup identity: 230i Coupé M Sport remains the rear-drive four-cylinder offering while M240i xDrive is the distinct AWD trim.

sources.title: BMW Germany 2 Series Coupe 2024 price list
sources.note: Official BMW Germany 2024 price list used for the G42 220i wheel and tire matrix.

sources.title: BMW Germany 2 Series Coupe current inline price list
sources.note: Official BMW Germany current price list used as a current-market cross-check for the G42 230i M Sport automatic RWD context, its visible 18/19-inch wheel matrix, and the separate M240i xDrive AWD listing.

sources.title: BMW UK iX2 technical data page
sources.note: Official BMW UK technical-data page for the BMW iX2 xDrive30 M Sport (model code IX25, productionYear 2023 metadata, fuelType E) used to confirm the exact iX2 page identity and the official transmission wording shown for this EV page.

sources.title: BMW Austria U10 X2 overview page
sources.note: Official BMW Austria overview page used to confirm U10 X2 identity, Austria market context, and that the surfaced U10 combustion lineup is presented as petrol and diesel only rather than as a plug-in-hybrid xDrive25e offering.

sources.title: BMW Austria U10 X2 technical data page
sources.note: Official BMW Austria technical-data page used to confirm the machine-readable U10 X2 model dropdown and transmission wording for the currently surfaced Austria-market lineup, which lists iX2 xDrive30, iX2 eDrive20, X2 sDrive20i, X2 M35i xDrive, X2 sDrive18d, X2 sDrive20d, and X2 xDrive20d, but no X2 xDrive25e row.

sources.title: BMW Germany G45 X3 model page
sources.note: Official BMW Germany model page whose embedded product metadata surfaces the exact BMW X3 20 xDrive with model-range G45 and productionYear 2024 in the live Germany-market G45 X3 range.

sources.title: BMW UK G45 X3 technical data page
sources.note: Official BMW UK technical-data page for the new G45 X3 model range used to confirm the live UK G45 page identity, productionYear 2024 metadata, and the existence of a current-market G45 technical-data surface while exact variant-level rendered tables remain JS-heavy.

sources.title: BMW Germany X3 2026 price list
sources.note: Official BMW Germany current price list used to confirm that the live G45 lineup names X3 20 xDrive, X3 20d xDrive, X3 30e xDrive, X3 40d xDrive, and X3 M50 xDrive, while not naming a non-PHEV X3 xDrive30 trim, and to document the current xDrive20 wheel and tire matrix with standard square 225/60 R18, optional square 245/50 R19, and optional staggered 255/45 R20 + 285/40 R20 and 255/40 R21 + 285/35 R21 packages.

sources.title: BMW Austria X3 2026 price list
sources.note: Official BMW Austria current price list used to confirm the live G45 lineup and technical-data tables for X3 20 xDrive, X3 20d xDrive, X3 30e xDrive, X3 40d xDrive, and X3 M50 xDrive, while not naming a non-PHEV X3 xDrive30 trim.

sources.title: BMW Germany U11 X1 overview page
sources.note: Official BMW Germany overview page whose embedded product block currently surfaces the exact BMW X1 xDrive23i within the U11 range and marks productionYear 2022 with petrol fuel metadata.

sources.title: BMW Germany U11 X1 technical data page
sources.note: Official BMW Germany technical-data page whose embedded product metadata currently surfaces the exact BMW X1 xDrive23i with productionYear 2022 and also exposes the exact BMW X1 sDrive18i with front-wheel-drive and seven-speed dual-clutch transmission metadata while the rendered spec tables remain JS-heavy.

sources.title: BMW UK U11 X1 technical data page
sources.note: Official BMW UK technical-data page whose embedded product block currently surfaces the exact BMW X1 xDrive23i xLine within the U11 range and marks productionYear 2022 with petrol fuel metadata while the rendered spec tables remain JS-heavy.
